execution_summary: The replication followed the preregistered plan: dataset was loaded, 1-D test-phase accuracies were aggregated at the participant level, and an independent-samples t-test (equal variances) compared contingent vs. full-information conditions. Cohen’s d was also computed. Execution completed without errors, fully matching the preregistration—no deviations or manual interventions were needed.

code_executed.logs:
Found dataset at /app/data/analysis-data.csv; computed scores and statistics; wrote /app/data/replication_results.json.
Stdout excerpt: t=4.92, p=1.20e-06, Cohen’s d=0.453.
code_executed.environment: Docker container based on python:3.10-slim with pandas 1.5+, numpy 1.23+, scipy 1.9+

results.hypothesis_tested: Participants in the contingent-feedback condition will show higher 1-D accuracy at test than participants in the full-information condition.
